_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.
allowed_domains: _comment: Egress allowlist used when egress_filter: true. Add any domain your agent needs.

ssh_hosts._comment2: Agent runs inside a long-lived Docker container on the remote host.
ssh_hosts._comment3: Best for: local servers / VMs you fully control.
ssh_hosts.name: my-server
ssh_hosts._comment_name: Identifier used in all make commands: make setup HOST=my-server
ssh_hosts._comment_hostname: IP or DNS name of the remote host.
ssh_hosts._comment_port: SSH port on the remote host.
ssh_hosts._comment_user: The agent SSH user. Must match AGENT_USER in .env.
ssh_hosts._comment_strict: true = verify host fingerprint (recommended). false = accept any host key.
ssh_hosts._comment_isolation: container (default) | restricted_key. See below for details.
ssh_hosts._comment_egress: true = block outbound traffic not in allowed_domains. Requires iptables on host.
ssh_hosts._comment_docker: true = bind-mount a filtered Docker socket so the agent can run containers.
project_paths: _comment: List of directories the agent can access. String form or object form.

project_paths._comment_github_repo: owner/repo on GitHub. Triggers deploy key generation.
project_paths._comment_github_write: false = read-only deploy key. true = read-write deploy key.

ssh_hosts._comment_ports: Ports to publish from the container to 127.0.0.1 on the host (e.g. [3000, 8080]).

ssh_hosts._comment: === CONTAINER ISOLATION with docker_access and forward_ports ===
ssh_hosts.name: my-dev-server

ssh_hosts._comment2: Agent runs directly on the host as dev-bot (no container).
ssh_hosts._comment3: Best for: RunPod / cloud VMs where you can't install rootless Docker.
ssh_hosts._comment4: project_access: acl — agent accesses source paths in-place via filesystem ACLs.
ssh_hosts._comment5: Changes are live on the source directory. Good when the source is already on the remote host.
ssh_hosts.name: my-runpod-acl
ssh_hosts._comment_project_access: acl | copy | clone. Controls how project files reach dev-bot.

project_paths._comment_path: Must exist on the REMOTE host (not the operator machine).

ssh_hosts._comment2: project_access: copy — project files are rsync-copied from the operator machine
ssh_hosts._comment3: into dev-bot's ~/workspace/<basename>. dev-bot owns all files.
ssh_hosts._comment4: Changes are isolated to dev-bot's copy; source on operator machine is untouched.
ssh_hosts._comment5: On re-setup, files are re-synced from source (operator machine -> remote).
ssh_hosts.name: my-runpod-copy

project_paths._comment_path: Absolute path on THIS (operator) machine — copied to remote on setup.

ssh_hosts._comment2: project_access: clone — repos are cloned fresh from GitHub into dev-bot's ~/workspace/<slug>.
ssh_hosts._comment3: dev-bot owns all files from the start; no dependency on local source paths.
ssh_hosts._comment4: Existing clones are left untouched on re-setup (not re-cloned).
ssh_hosts._comment5: Best for: remote hosts with no local copy; avoids root-owned file issues from Docker containers.
ssh_hosts._comment6: Requires github_repo on every project_path entry.
ssh_hosts.name: my-runpod-clone

project_paths._comment_path: path is optional in clone mode — omit it or leave it out entirely.
